narrative.headline: 2022 Chevrolet Colorado: electrical and steering lead owner complaints
narrative.summary: Across 45 owner complaints to NHTSA, the electrical system is reported most at 16 reports (36%), followed by steering at 11 (24%). One electrical complaint involved a crash and one injury. No fires were reported in any category. Service brakes, engine, and power train each drew a handful of reports.
